case_title: SANCHEZ, VICTOR VS LOPEZ, NELSON V. DBA NELSON'S AUTO TOWING

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2007 - JUDGMENT. BETH WILBER-CLERK, JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELLE MCGILL, NOTHING ON RECORD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, NELSON V. DBA NELSON'S AUTO TOWING $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $710.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
